# Arbeloa Out — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A sports voting campaign website called 'Arbeloa Out' where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes. It is inspired by a similar existing site (mbappeout.replit.app) and should replicate its functionality and design style — a bold, fan-driven protest campaign page focused on engagement and virality.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
A sports voting campaign website called &#39;Arbeloa Out&#39; where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Arbeloa Out
A sports voting campaign website called 'Arbeloa Out' where fans can vote to remove Arbeloa. The site features a real-time vote counter with a goal of 20 votes. It is inspired by a similar existing site (mbappeout.replit.app) and should replicate its functionality and design style — a bold, fan-driven protest campaign page focused on engagement and virality.

## Target Audience
- אוהדי כדורגל שרוצים להצביע להעיף את ארבלואה
- Football Fanatics
- Real-Time Voters
- Discontent Fans

## Industry
ספורט / כדורגל

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
